rule_metadata.author: oscd.community, Teymur Kheirkhabarov @HeirhabarovT, Zach Stanford @svch0st, Tim Shelton
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials
id: 941e5c45-cda7-4864-8cea-bbb7458d194a
status: test
description: Detects suspicious processes logging on with explicit credentials
references:
- https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lKya3_mLnR3UQuCoiYruO3qgu052_iS_/view
author: oscd.community, Teymur Kheirkhabarov @HeirhabarovT, Zach Stanford @svch0st,
  Tim Shelton
date: 2020-10-05
modified: 2022-08-03
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.initial-access
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1078
- attack.lateral-movement
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4648
    ProcessName|endswith:
    - \cmd.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \pwsh.exe
    - \winrs.exe
    - \wmic.exe
    - \net.exe
    - \net1.exe
    - \reg.exe
  filter1:
    TargetServerName: localhost
  filter2:
    SubjectUserName|endswith: $
    TargetUserName|endswith: $
  condition: selection and not 1 of filter*
falsepositives:
- Administrators that use the RunAS command or scheduled tasks
level: medium
